retry_reason: After a put, the caller must not use the object again; retrying would cause a double-put and use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference to a bpf_task_work_ctx. When the last reference is dropped (refcount reaches zero), the context is destroyed either directly or via deferred irq_work if interrupts are disabled. The caller must not use the object after calling this function.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the refcount and clean up when last reference is dropped; no other business logic.

check.reason: The function calls refcount_dec_and_test on &ctx->refcnt, which is a put operation on the refcount member of the parameter ctx. The access path ctx.refcnt.refs and type chain bpf_task_work_ctx--refcount_t--atomic_t correctly capture the nested fields. The location (parameter, index 1) is correct as the refcount belongs to the input parameter.
